about.title: Get to know me!
paragraphs: I'm a software engineer who loves solving complex problems and building things that make life easier. While I spend my days focusing on backend infrastructure and creating smooth developer tools, I care way more about clean, reliable systems than just chasing the latest tech trends.

Outside of coding, I spend my time gaming and running a Discord community of over 1,500 members. For me, whether it's building software or managing a community, it's all about bringing people together and constantly finding ways to improve.

list.title: @lilsnibbi/utils
list.description: An NPM package with common utilities, classes and other helpful tools that I use in all of my projects!

list.title: Mocha
list.description: The discord bot for my community!
